selectionPolicy: capability-first; prefer examples matching available lyric, harmonic, and structure evidence
notes: Examples teach evidence usage and degraded-mode honesty, not stylistic sequencing behavior.
This module is media-only and must not introduce xLights mutation assumptions.

expectedBehavior: bias recurring title/hook block to Chorus
return short rationale and explicit confidence
do not fabricate lyric-derived structure confidence
use meter-aware BPM correction when strong external evidence supports it
surface mismatch diagnostics when evidence is incoherent
retain provider lineage in artifact provenance
keep downstream handoff distilled but artifact-rich
treat persisted analysis.json as canonical source of truth
rebuild the same distilled handoff from the persisted artifact
do not lose capability availability or degraded-mode truth during rehydration
